info.title: Meteologix AG / Kachelmannwetter - API
info.description:
## Usage / Requirements

To use this API, you need to have an active subscription for one of the following services:

* [kachelmannwetter.com](https://kachelmannwetter.com) - "**Plus**-Abonnement" (monatlich / jährlich) - nichtkommerzielle Nutzung
* [meteologix.com](https://meteologix.com) - "AD FREE **PLUS**" (monthly / yearly) - non-commercial use
* [weather.us](https://weather.us) - "AD FREE **PLUS**" (monthly / yearly) - non-commercial use
* [Weather API](https://accounts.meteologix.com/products) - Business Starter - commercial use allowed


### Locations

Our Hobby / Smart-Home plans for private usage are limited to two locations.  
Before starting to use the API, you'll have to set at least one location within your Plus- or API-subscription.

To set up a location, open the [subscription list within our account portal](https://accounts.meteologix.com/subscriptions) and find the 
"manage API locations" / "API-Standorte verwalten" button in the subscription box and set a location within the map.

### Authenticate

To be able to execute requests, you have to authenticate yourself with an API-Token.  
To acquire an API-Token, open the [subscription list within our account portal](https://accounts.meteologix.com/subscriptions) 
and go to "Manage API Keys" / "API-Keys verwalten" within your API- or Plus-subscription.

## Parameter Packages

This is an overview of the parameters provided within the different endpoints.  
Fore more details check the "Response Data"-sections of each individual endpoint on the left.

| Standard                              | Advanced |
| ------------------------------------- | -------- |
| Mean sea level pressure `hPa`         | Min. Temperature 2m, 6h `°C / °F` |
| Temperature, 2 meter `°C / °F`        | Max. Temperature 2m, 6h `°C / °F` |
| Relative humidity `%`                | Min. Temperature 2m, 12h `°C / °F` |
| Dewpoint `°C / °F`                    | Max. Temperature 2m, 12h `°C / °F` |
| Wind speed and direction `m/s / mph`  | Significant weather `wmoCode` |
| Wind gust speed 1h `m/s / mph`        | Cloud coverage low `%` |
| Wind gust speed 3h `m/s / mph`        | Cloud coverage medium `%` |
| Cloud coverage `%`                   | Cloud coverage high `%` |
| Precipitation 1h `mm / inch`          | Precipitation 6h sum `mm / inch` |
| Precipitation 3h `mm / inch`          | Precipitation 12h sum `mm / inch` |
| Precipitation 6h `mm / inch`          | Precipitation 24h sum `mm / inch` |
| Snow height `m / inch`                | Precipitation `snow` 6h `mm / inch` |
| Sunshine duration of 1h `min`         | Precipitation `snow` 12h `mm / inch` |
|                                       | Precipitation `snow` 24h `mm / inch` |
|                                       | Global radiation `Wh/m²` |
|                                       | Weather symbol information |

## Unit conversions 

### Speed

| source unit     | target unit  | formula                   |
|-----------------|--------------|---------------------------|
| m/s             | km/h         | `km/h = m/s x 3.6`        |
| m/s             | kn           | `kn   = m/s x 1.94384`    |
| m/s             | mph          | `mph  = m/s x 2.23694`    |
| kn              | m/s          | `m/s  = kn x 0.514444444` |
| kn              | km/h         | `km/h = kn x 1.852`       |
| kn              | mph          | `mph  = kn x 1.15078`     |


### Lengths

| source unit     | target unit  | formula                   |
|-----------------|--------------|---------------------------|
| mm              | inch         | `in = mm x 0.0393701`     |
| m               | feet         | `ft = m x 3.281`          |    


### Temperatures

| source unit     | target unit  | formula                        |
|-----------------|--------------|--------------------------------|
| °C              | K            | `K  = °C - 273.15`             |
| °C              | °F           | `°F = °C x 1.8 + 32`           |
| K               | °C           | `°C = K + 273.15`              |
| K               | °F           | `°F = (K + 273.15) x 1.8 + 32` |


## Terms of Service / Privacy Policy

Here you'll find [our terms of service](https://accounts.meteologix.com/static/api-nutzungsbedingungen) and [privacy policy](https://accounts.meteologix.com/static/api-datenschutzerklaerung) 

## Rate-Limit

Depending on your subscription you'll have a burst rate limit within one minute:

| Subscription     | Limit                 |
| ---------------- | ----------------------|
| Hobby            | 120 requests / minute |
| Business Starter | 250 requests / minute |

Additionally a daily request limit is applied to the hobby plan, so the monthly request limit will be ensured.  
This daily limit has the advantage that, in a case of too many requests, you do not have to wait for many days until you get unblocked.

| Subscription | Limit |
| ------------ | ------|
| Hobby        | 700 requests / day |


Within the response headers you'll find information about your rate limit.  
After you hit the rate limit, check the `x-ratelimit-retry-after` header to see, when you're allowed to request again.

```
x-ratelimit-limit: 700 
x-ratelimit-remaining: 623  
x-ratelimit-retry-after: 2023-05-19T20:51:44+00:00
```

get.description:
The latest observed parameters for the requested station are available here.

This also reflects the current situation of the weather at the station's location, since not all parameters are measured within the
smallest resolution possible.

e.g. hourly wind gusts are not reported every 10 minutes at with this endpoint you get the latest report of hourly wind gusts together
with the dateTime this measurement was reported.

## Parameters and their units

All [possible parameters and units can be seen at the station timeseries response](\#/operations/get_station_observations#response-body).

parameters.name: stationId
parameters.description: the station id to get the measurements

get.description:
This gives you the best available information about the current weather at the given location.

We use 3 main sources to provide you with information about the current conditions at the given locations. Which values and sources
are used depend on the availability at the location.
The main sources are:
- Observations from weather stations
  - high precision
  - worldwide but only available near weather stations
  - sometimes not all values are available from a station (e.g. not all stations have wind sensors)
- Analysis
  - medium precision
  - currently available for Germany, Austria, Switzerland and surrounding areas only
  - see the following link for the covered area:\
    https://kachelmannwetter.com/de/analyse/superhd/super-hd/temperatur.html
- Forecasts
  - low to medium precision, depending on the available forecast model at this location
  - available worldwide

## Parameters and their units

All [possible parameters and units can be seen at the forecast response](\#/operations/get_forecast_standard#response-body) documentation regardless of their source.

Within our 3-Day Forecast you'll get daily summaries about the main weather conditions for the given geolocation.

Depending on the time of the request, you will get a 3-day forecast including today or later in the day you'll get a 3-day forecast starting from tomorrow.
You may use the `dayName` property to easily translate this for display purposes.

Additional to the daily summary, there are summaries for night (0-6), morning (6-12), afternoon (12-18) and evening (18-24)
within the `timeOfDay` parameter.

With our 14-Day Trend you'll get a quick overview of how the weather may be within the next two weeks.

For this trend forecast we analyse data of multiple forecast models and give the best guess prognosis on a daily basis.

Our standard parameter package contains the most default parameters to get a quick overview of the upcoming weather conditions.

Depending on the `timeSteps` value you get a different amount of forecast hours

| timeSteps   | amount of forecast hours |
| ---------- | ------------------------- |
| 1h         | up to 24 hours            |
| 3h         | up to 120 hours           |
| 6h         | up to 240 hours           |

Find a list of the [parameters within the data array/object of the response-body](#response-body)

parameters.name: timeSteps
parameters.description: the time steps, e.g. 3h for a forecast values every 3 hours (8 values per day)

get.description:
Our advanced parameter package contains some more detailed parameters of the upcoming weather conditions.

Depending on the `timeSteps` value you get a different amount of forecast hours

| timeSteps   | amount of forecast hours |
| ---------- | ------------------------- |
| 1h         | up to 24 hours            |
| 3h         | up to 120 hours           |
| 6h         | up to 240 hours           |

Find a list of the [parameters within the data array/object of the response-body](#response-body)

parameters.name: timeSteps
parameters.description: the time steps, e.g. 3h for a forecast values every 3 hours (8 values per day)

get.description:
Depending on your subscription you may have access to one, two or unlimited locations for station observations.

Here you may search for stations at a given location.
Finding a station within this endpoint does not automatically mea that you are allowed to get all data from this station.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: the radius to search for stations in km

get.description:
This a good source to display charts of measurements or simple summaries of measured weather station values.

These e.g. daily or hourly aggregations (timeStep) *do not comply with climatological standards* but as an advantage
also provide values if only some measurements within the given resolutions time interval are present.

Daily aggregations take care of the local timezone and aggregate from midnight local time to midnight local time.

Depending on the `timeStep` value you get a different amount of historical data.

| timeStep   | amount of history |
| ---------- | ----------------- |
| 1d         | 7 days            |
| 1h         | 24 hours          |
| 10min      | 6 hours           |

parameters.name: stationId
parameters.description: the station id to get the measurements

parameters.name: timeSteps
parameters.description: the maximum resolution of observation data

get.description:
Get some astronomical data for the next 14 days. This includes moon and sun information.

Find a list of the [parameters within the data array/object of the response-body](#response-body)

Get a svg image that represents the weather symbols used within our forecast or analysis for display purposes

Current possible symbols (also with `_night` suffix) are:

`cloudy`, `fog`, `freezingrain`, `overcast`, `partlycloudy`, `rain`, `raindrizzle`, `rainheavy`, `severethunderstorm`, `showers`, `showersheavy`, `snow`, `snowheavy`, `snowrain`, `snowrainshowers`, `snowshowers`, `snowshowersheavy`, `sunshine`, `thunderstorm`, `wind`

parameters.name: weatherSymbol
parameters.description: use the values of `weatherSymbol` from our forecast responses to get an appropriate image

globalRadiation.description: global radiation in Wh/m² for the preceding timespan

weatherSymbol.description: a symbol representing the weather situation, see the [Tools / Weather Symbol](\#/operations/get_tools_weather_symbol) endpoint to get the correct weather symbol

modelResolution.description:
the weather models resolution  

| Value    | Resolution |
| -------- | --------- |
| STANDARD | >= ~10km |
| HIGH      | >=  ~4km | 
| SUPER_HIGH | <  ~4km |

type.description: the data type of the parameter

systemOfUnits.description: the system of units for values within this forecast response

isDay.description: if most of this day part is during daytime

tempMax.description: the maximum temperature 2m above ground [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

tempMin.description: the minimum temperature 2m above ground [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

windGust.description: the most probable wind gust speed [metric: m/s, imperial: mph]

windSpeed.description: average wind speed (for a timespan) [metric: m/s, imperial: mph]

windDirection.description: average direction from which the wind originates in degree (0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W)

risks.description: weather risks that may occur during this time

tempMax.description: the most probable maximum temperature 2m above ground [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

tempMin.description: the most probable minimum temperature 2m above ground [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

risks.description: weather risks that may occur during this time

alt.description: altitude used for the forecast [metric: m, imperial: feet]

systemOfUnits.description: the system of units for values within this forecast response

isWeekend.description: if the day is a day on the weekend (saturday or sunday)

weekday.description: the weekday of this day [Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri, Sat, Sun]

tempMax.description: the most probable maximum temperature 2m above ground [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

tempMaxLow.description: the lowest of all maximum temperatures from the multiple forecast models used for this trend [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

tempMaxHigh.description: the highest of all maximum temperatures from the multiple forecast models used for this trend [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

tempMin.description: the most probable minimum temperature 2m above ground [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

tempMinLow.description: the lowest of all minimum temperatures from the multiple forecast models used for this trend [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

tempMinHigh.description: the highest of all minimum temperatures from the multiple forecast models used for this trend [metric: °C, imperial: °F]

prec.description: the most probable amount of precipitation [metric: mm, imperial: inch]

precLow.description: the lowest calculated precipitation amount of the multiple forecast models used for this trend [metric: mm, imperial: inch]

precHigh.description: the highest calculated precipitation amount of the multiple forecast models used for this trend [metric: mm, imperial: inch]

precProb1mm.description: the predicted probability of precipitation >= 1mm in %

precProb10mm.description: the predicted probability of precipitation >= 10mm in %

precType.description: the type of precipitation [rain = rain|snow = snow|snowrain = rain, snow or sleet]

precIntensity.description: the intensity of precipitation [1 = normal precipitation, 2 = showers, 3 = heavy showers]

precWord.description: a text representation of precipitation for display / icon / translation purposes

windGust.title: t
windGust.description: he most probable wind gust speed [metric: m/s, imperial: mph]

windGustLow.description: the lowest calculated gust speed of the multiple forecast models used for this trend [metric: m/s, imperial: mph]

windGustHigh.description: the highest calculated gust speed of the multiple forecast models used for this trend [metric: m/s, imperial: mph]

sunMaxPos.description: maximum possible hours of sunshine during the day if there would be no cloud coverage [h]

sunHours.description: the most probable amount of hours the sun will be visible [h]

sunHoursRelative.description: the relative value of sunshine during the day [%]

sunHoursHigh.description: the highest calculated sunshine duration of the multiple forecast models used for this trend [h]

cloudWord.description: textual representation of cloudiness [clear, few, scattered, broken, overcast]

thunderStorm.description: type of expected thunderstorm activity [1 = thunderstorm expected, 2 = heavy thunderstorms expected]

alt.description: altitude used for the forecast [metric: m, imperial: feet]

isDay.title: if it is day or night

alt.description: altitude used for the forecast [metric: m, imperial: feet]

systemOfUnits.description: the system of units for values within this forecast response

id.title: Station ID. This ID may be used for other requests regarding this station. e.g. to get a timeseries of station data.

precision.title: how precise the measurements of this station are. Some amateur stations may be less precise.

type.title: gives information to which station network this station belongs to / Vereinigte Hagel (VH)

recentlyActive.title: did this station send measurements recently

distance.title: distance to the location in km

name.description: the name of the analyzed field

countAbove.description: number of values that are above the thresholdValue

count.description: count of all values that have been measured

thresholdValue.description: the thresholdValue that has been used for the analysis

dateTime.description: the date and time of the observation (ISO 8601)

temp.description: latest measured temperature at the time / in this timespan [°C]

precSum.description: the sum of precipitation within the timespan [mm]

precSumBest.description: the best value for precipitation (this may be a corrected value depending on radar data) [mm]

precSumModified.description: this flag determines if the sum of precipitation in the given timespan has been automatically corrected (depending on radar data) [bool]

prec24h.description: the sum of precipitation within the previous 24h timespan [mm]

windGustMax.description: the maximum wind gust that was observed within the timespan [kn]

windDirectionMean.description: average direction from which the wind originates in degree (0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W) [°]

pressureMean.description: average air pressure at station level (QFE) [hPa]

pressureMslMean.description: average air pressure at MSL / temperature adjusted (QFF) [hPa]

soilWaterPot10Mean.description: soil water potential / tension - 10cm below surface in [kPa]

soilWaterPot30Mean.description: soil water potential / tension - 30cm below surface in [kPa]

soilWaterPot60Mean.description: soil water potential / tension - 60cm below surface in [kPa]

qualityFlagsRaw.description: raw quality flags string to determine the aggregated data quality

dateTime.description: the date and time of the observation

windDirection.description: average direction from which the wind originates in degree (0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W) [°]

windGust.description: wind gusts speed within reference time / since last observation [kn]

pressureMsl.description: air pressure at MSL / temperature adjusted (QFF) [hPa]

tempMin.description: the minimum temperature 2m above ground within the last 12h [°C]

tempMax.description: the maximum temperature 2m above ground within the last 12h [°C]

tempMin1h.description: the minimum temperature 2m above ground within the last hour [°C]

tempMax1h.description: the maximum temperature 2m above ground within the last hour [°C]

soilWaterPot10.description: soil water potential / tension - 10cm below surface [kPa]

soilWaterPot30.description: soil water potential / tension - 30cm below surface [kPa]

soilWaterPot60.description: soil water potential / tension - 60cm below surface [kPa]

sunrise.description: date and time of the sunrise

sunset.description: date and time of the sunset

transit.description: date and time when the sun is at its zenith

civilDawn.description: date and time when civil dawn begins

civilDusk.description: date and time when civil dusk ends

nauticalDawn.description: date and time when nautical dawn begins

nauticalDusk.description: date and time when nautical dusk ends

astronomicalDawn.description: date and time when astronomical dawn begins

astronomicalDusk.description: date and time when astronomical dusk ends

moonIllumination.description: how much of the moon is illuminated [%]

moonPhase.description: moon phase (0 = new moon, 1-49 = waxing moon, 50 = full moon, 51-99 = waning moon) [%]

moonRise.description: date and time when the moon rises

moonSet.description: date and time when the moon sets

run.description: when astronomical values have been calculated

nextFullMoon.description: date and time of the next full moon

nextNewMoon.description: date and time of the next new moon

BadRequest.description:
Bad Request  
This may occur when a parameter is out of bounds.

NotFound.description:
Not Found  
The resource you are trying to access could not be found.

Unauthorized.description:
Unauthorized  
You provided no or wrong credentials.

TooManyRequests.description:
Too Many Requests  
This may happen if you exceeded the request limit or if there are any pending tasks, that may not be executed multiple times.

AccessDenied.description:
Forbidden / Access Denied  
You do not have enough rights to access this ressource.

units.name: units
units.description: system of units for the response data

minForecastHours.name: minHours
minForecastHours.description:
if set, you'll only get forecasts that have at least `minHours` of forecast hours  
if the `model` parameter is set, `minHours` will be ignored

ForecastModel.name: model
ForecastModel.description: forecast model to be used for a forecast

ALL.summary: ALL - available models for the location

ApiKey.description: API-Keys can be configured within your subscription settings at [https://accounts.meteologix.com](https://accounts.meteologix.com)
ApiKey.name: X-API-Key

BasicAuth.description: _currently for internal and enterprise use only - please use "API Key" authentication unless otherwise instructed_

BearerAuth.description: _currently for internal and enterprise use only - please use "API Key" authentication unless otherwise instructed_
